name: Array
description: Index-based sequences, scanning, and in-place mutation patterns used in most interviews.

name: String
description: Character arrays, parsing, pattern matching, and text algorithms.

name: Hash Table
description: O(1) lookups, frequency maps, and set-based reasoning.

name: Linked List
description: Pointer manipulation, reversal, and cycle detection.

name: Stack
description: LIFO structures for parsing, monotonic stacks, and nested structures.

name: Queue
description: FIFO processing, BFS layers, and sliding windows of events.

name: Binary Heap
description: Priority queues for top-k, scheduling, and graph algorithms.

name: Tree
description: Binary trees, traversals, and hierarchical recursion.

name: Binary Search Tree
description: Ordered trees and BST invariants.

name: Graph
description: Nodes, edges, connectivity, and shortest paths.

name: Math
description: Number theory, combinatorics, and arithmetic tricks.

name: Bit Manipulation
description: Bitwise ops, masks, and constant-space tricks.

name: Sort
description: Sorting-based solutions and comparison strategies.

name: Two Pointers
description: Opposite or same-direction pointers on arrays and strings.

name: Recursion
description: Base cases, divide-and-conquer, and recursive state.

name: Binary Search
description: Search on sorted ranges and answer-space binary search.

name: Breadth-First Search
description: Level-order exploration and shortest unweighted paths.

name: Depth-First Search
description: Deep traversal, backtracking setups, and components.

name: Backtracking
description: Explore-and-prune search for combinations and permutations.

name: Dynamic Programming
description: Optimal substructure, overlapping subproblems, and state design.

name: Greedy
description: Locally optimal choices that yield global solutions.

name: Geometry
description: Points, lines, intervals, and geometric invariants.

name: Simulation
description: Step-by-step process modeling.

name: Design
description: Data structure design and API-oriented problems.

name: Concurrency
description: Multi-threaded coordination problems.

name: SQL
description: Relational queries and aggregation.

name: Shell Script
description: Unix command-line scripting challenges.
